name: Agricultural Syndicate
summary: Alliance-wide coordinators of communal food production, irrigation discipline, and harvest distribution across the Eternal Lands.
motive: Maintain food stability, preserve productive land, and keep communal supply obligations met.
methods: harvest festivals tied to contribution recognition
power_relations: Answers upward to the Giant Council and regional leaders
Works alongside the Engineers’ Consortium and allocation logistics
Can pressure local settlements through ration and labor priorities
current_pressure: need to keep food moving into industrial zones
visible_membership_base: Farm stewards, irrigation crews, grain counters, storehouse officers, and communal field laborers.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: High output expectations can turn communal planning into coercive pressure when weather or transport fails.
